'''âth-ng-r''' ('''kathangar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:precisify|precisify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ng-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:precisify|precisify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-ng-r
|-
! Lemma
| kathangar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithangar|thithangar]] || [[word:jithangar|jithangar]] || [[word:shithangar|shithangar]] || [[word:kithangar|kithangar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthangar|thuthuthangar]] || [[word:jujuthangar|jujuthangar]] || [[word:shushuthangar|shushuthangar]] || [[word:kukuthangar|kukuthangar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthangar|thuthangar]] || [[word:juthangar|juthangar]] || [[word:shuthangar|shuthangar]] || [[word:kuthangar|kuthangar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthangar|thuthangar]] || [[word:juthangar|juthangar]] || [[word:shuthangar|shuthangar]] || [[word:kuthangar|kuthangar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethangar|thethangar]] || [[word:jethangar|jethangar]] || [[word:shethangar|shethangar]] || [[word:kethangar|kethangar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothangar|thothothangar]] || [[word:jojothangar|jojothangar]] || [[word:shoshothangar|shoshothangar]] || [[word:kokothangar|kokothangar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothangar|thothangar]] || [[word:jothangar|jothangar]] || [[word:shothangar|shothangar]] || [[word:kothangar|kothangar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothangar|thothangar]] || [[word:jothangar|jothangar]] || [[word:shothangar|shothangar]] || [[word:kothangar|kothangar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthangar|thĂŠthangar]] || [[word:jĂŠthangar|jĂŠthangar]] || [[word:shĂŠthangar|shĂŠthangar]] || [[word:kĂŠthangar|kĂŠthangar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathangar|thathathangar]] || [[word:jajathangar|jajathangar]] || [[word:shashathangar|shashathangar]] || [[word:kakathangar|kakathangar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathangar|thathangar]] || [[word:jathangar|jathangar]] || [[word:shathangar|shathangar]] || [[word:kathangar|kathangar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathangar|thathangar]] || [[word:jathangar|jathangar]] || [[word:shathangar|shathangar]] || [[word:kathangar|kathangar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathangar|shathangar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathangar|goshathangar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathangar|gokishathangar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathangarnĂŒ|shathangarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathangarnknĂŒ|goshathangarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathangarnĂŒ|gokishathangarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathangarshĂ«|shathangarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathangarnkshĂ«|goshathangarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathangarshĂ«|gokishathangarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathangaro|shathangaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathangarnkro|goshathangarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathangaro|gokishathangaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathangarmu|shathangarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathangarnkmu|goshathangarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathangarmu|gokishathangarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathangarsher|shathangarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathangarnksher|goshathangarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathangarsher|gokishathangarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathangarng|shathangarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathangarnkng|goshathangarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathangarng|gokishathangarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathangarya|shathangarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathangarnkya|goshathangarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathangarya|gokishathangarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathangaryam|shathangaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathangarnkyam|goshathangarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathangaryam|gokishathangaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathangarnĂŒshĂ«|shathangarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathangarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathangarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathangarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathangarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathangarnĂŒro|shathangarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathangarnknĂŒro|goshathangarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathangarnĂŒro|gokishathangarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathangarnĂŒmu|shathangarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathangarnknĂŒmu|goshathangarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathangarnĂŒmu|gokishathangarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathangarshĂ«nĂŒ|shathangarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathangarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathangarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathangarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathangarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathangarshĂ«ro|shathangarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathangarnkshĂ«ro|goshathangarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathangarshĂ«ro|gokishathangarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathangarshĂ«mu|shathangarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathangarnkshĂ«mu|goshathangarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathangarshĂ«mu|gokishathangarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathangaronĂŒ|shathangaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathangarnkronĂŒ|goshathangarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathangaronĂŒ|gokishathangaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathangaroshĂ«|shathangaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathangarnkroshĂ«|goshathangarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathangaroshĂ«|gokishathangaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathangaromu|shathangaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathangarnkromu|goshathangarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathangaromu|gokishathangaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathangarmunĂŒ|shathangarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathangarnkmunĂŒ|goshathangarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathangarmunĂŒ|gokishathangarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathangarmushĂ«|shathangarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathangarnkmushĂ«|goshathangarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathangarmushĂ«|gokishathangarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathangarmuro|shathangarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathangarnkmuro|goshathangarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathangarmuro|gokishathangarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
